item.title:
New in Gemini: Generate files and export them
Tell Gemini what you want to create and the format, a...
item.description:
New in Gemini: Generate files and export them
Tell Gemini what you want to create and the format, and it now does the work for you.
Now supporting: 📄 Google Docs, Word (.docx) & PDFs 📊 Google Sheets, Excel (.xlsx) & CSV 🖥️ Google Slides 🛠️ Markdown, LaTeX, TXT, RTF
Available now on all surfaces globally!
--- @joshwoodward | ❤️ 43 | 🔁 9 | 💬 9 | 👁 817
item.author: @joshwoodward

item.title:
Best Use of Claude Managed Agents: ARIA by Idriss Benguezzou and Adam Hnaien from France
A maintena...
item.description:
Best Use of Claude Managed Agents: ARIA by Idriss Benguezzou and Adam Hnaien from France
A maintenance system that reads your machine manuals, and when something goes wrong, creates a work order for your technician with the fix that worked last time.
https://t.co/XbKCYMLzb8
--- @claudeai | ❤️ 31 | 🔁 0 | 💬 7 | 👁 11825
item.author: @claudeai

item.title:

item.description:
Another Claude Code hackathon comes to an end.
Thank you to everyone who spent a week building with Opus 4.7, and to @cerebral_valley for co-hosting.
Introducing the winners:
--- @claudeai | ❤️ 393 | 🔁 14 | 💬 55 | 👁 19970
item.author: @claudeai

item.title:
Running OpenClaw/Hermes in 2026 feels a lot like running Linux in 2002.
You spend hours compiling d...
item.description:
Running OpenClaw/Hermes in 2026 feels a lot like running Linux in 2002.
You spend hours compiling drivers. Debugging configs. Jerry-rigging the whole thing together.
You feel real accomplishment.
Then you ask yourself: why did I do this again?
--- @adityaag | ❤️ 3 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 237
item.author: @adityaag

item.title: RT @krispuckett: Emily is one of the smartest people I’ve ever worked with. So rad to see this.

Crypto’s next chapter is bigger than trading.

item.title:
Integrated codex review into clawsweeper.
I'm using a very similar system prompt so this gets you t...
item.description:
Integrated codex review into clawsweeper.
I'm using a very similar system prompt so this gets you the same as /review, and clawsweeper has automerge, loops until it stops finding new issues. https://t.co/AiNNDcvGke https://t.co/3pDc2JdLCm
--- @steipete | ❤️ 104 | 🔁 3 | 💬 11 | 👁 10309
item.author: @steipete
